title: Intune Analytics - Compliance Overview

tiles.title: 📊 Compliance by Status
tiles.query:
DeviceComplianceStates_Current
| summarize Count=count() by Status
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: 📋 Compliance by Policy
tiles.query:
ComplianceSummaryByPolicy()
| project PolicyName, Compliant, NonCompliant, ComplianceRate
| order by NonCompliant desc

tiles.title: ❌ Worst Performing Policies
tiles.query:
ComplianceSummaryByPolicy()
| top 5 by NonCompliant
| project PolicyName, NonCompliant, ComplianceRate

tiles.title: 🔴 Non-Compliant Devices (Top 20)
tiles.query:
NonCompliantDevices()
| take 20
| project DeviceName, UserDisplayName, PolicyName, FailedSettingCount

tiles.title: 💻 Compliance by OS
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize 
    Total=count(),
    Compliant=countif(ComplianceState == 'compliant')
    by OperatingSystem
| extend Rate = round(100.0 * Compliant / Total, 1)
| project OperatingSystem, Compliant, Total, Rate

tiles.title: 🆕 Newly Non-Compliant (Last 6h)
tiles.query:
AlertNewNonCompliant()
| project DeviceName, UserDisplayName, PolicyName, DetectedAt

description: Monitor device compliance status across your Intune environment. Shows overall compliance rates, policy-level breakdowns, and identifies non-compliant devices requiring attention.
